PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cory Louie, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court begins by confirming that Mr. Louie has learned how to administer an estate via information gathered on the internet. The court then confirms with Mr. Louie that he has provided notice to the Department of Health Care Services. Mr. Louie advises that he has already been handling administrative services. Mr. Louie is advised that he should not commingle estate and trust assets.
The court then asks if anyone is appearing to object to this petition. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Dec-04-2013 is admitted to probate. Cory Louie is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing of Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Dec-20-2021 - the Inventory and Appraisal on file is not correct. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-24-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
